name: Jellyfin Canopy
description: Jellyfin Canopy is an independent fork and extensive modernization of Jellyfin Enhanced, providing an integrated suite of playback, discovery, customization and media-management features for Jellyfin 12.
overview: An integrated suite of playback, discovery, customization and media-management features for Jellyfin 12.

versions.changelog:
- Jellyfin Elevate is now Jellyfin Canopy, with a redesigned admin app and per-user settings panel.
- Adds Discovery, live session control, Auto-Skip v2, Sonarr/Radarr item actions, and deeper Seerr request support.
- Security and reliability: hardens authorization, privacy failure modes, reverse-proxy identity, secret scanning, and cache/state handling.
- Breaking for custom integrations: the browser facade is `window.JellyfinCanopy`, API routes use `/JellyfinCanopy/*`, and settings DOM hooks changed.
- Migration: the unchanged plugin GUID makes this an in-place upgrade; server and browser state migrate automatically and rollback leaves legacy files intact.
- Requires Jellyfin 12 (`targetAbi` 12.0.0.0).

Full release notes: https://github.com/4eh5xitv6787h645ebv/Jellyfin-Canopy/releases/tag/2.0.0.0

- First Jellyfin Elevate release for Jellyfin 12, independently forked from Jellyfin Enhanced.
- Adds the integrated playback, discovery, customization, Seerr, arr, Spoiler Guard, and media-management feature set.
- Security and privacy hardening covers authorization, parental filtering, SSRF, client injection, secret scanning, and per-user state isolation.
- Migration: install through the Elevate plugin repository; existing compatible settings and plugin data are retained.
- Requires Jellyfin 12 (`targetAbi` 12.0.0.0).

Full release notes: https://github.com/4eh5xitv6787h645ebv/Jellyfin-Canopy/releases/tag/1.0.0.0
